1.name: Survivor in business clothes
1.iconic: torn white button-up shirt (untucked, top two buttons missing), grey suit trousers ripped at the hems, barefoot

dirt_by_day.5: heavily smudged + soot, one sleeve torn

1.title: I wake up here
1.arc_beat: Disorientation → realization it's real → calling out → no answer → settling in for the first night, terrified.

pieces.prompt: Cinematic 1:1 square, slow push-in on {subject} lying on the jungle floor at dawn, eyes slowly fluttering open, dense leaf canopy above, pink-gold light filtering through, torn white button-up shirt and grey suit trousers (clean), barefoot, shoulder-length tousled hair, dazed and disoriented, shallow depth of field, teal-and-gold grade, hyperreal
pieces.caption: Where… where am I?

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, {subject} sitting bolt upright on the jungle floor, hand pressed to forehead, wincing, looking around disoriented, soft dawn light, torn white shirt + grey trousers (clean), a massive mossy fallen log behind, short reaction loop
pieces.caption: Oh god. My head.

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, high wide shot looking down on {subject} sitting small in a jungle clearing surrounded by ferns, a massive mossy fallen log beside them, three slim palm trees, soft mid-morning light, torn white shirt + grey trousers, barefoot, looking down at their own hands
pieces.caption: This isn't my bed. This isn't anywhere I know.

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, {subject} standing on a rocky outcrop above the canopy, distant ocean barely visible on the horizon, one hand shading eyes, mid-morning sun, torn white shirt + grey trousers, windblown hair, dawning realization
pieces.caption: Ocean. I can see ocean. So… I'm on an island?

pieces.prompt: Cinematic 1:1 square, {subject} cupping both hands around mouth and shouting into the dense jungle, turning desperately, harsh midday light shafting through the canopy, torn white shirt + grey trousers (faint dirt), one continuous take
pieces.caption: HELLO?! IS ANYONE THERE?!

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, {subject} walking through ferns then FREEZING mid-step, head tilting to listen, eyes darting, sudden stillness, dappled midday light, torn white shirt + grey trousers, short tense loop
pieces.caption: What was that?

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, {subject} sitting on a fallen log with knees pulled to chest, looking absurdly out of place in office work clothes amid the lush jungle, warm afternoon light, torn white shirt + grey trousers, hollow thousand-yard stare
pieces.caption: I had a meeting at ten. I had a meeting.

pieces.prompt: Cinematic 1:1 square, {subject} crouched at the base of a tree gathering large leaves into a pile for a bed, working with tired focus, orange-purple light fading through the canopy, torn white shirt + grey trousers (light dirt), one continuous take
pieces.caption: Just for tonight. I just need to get through tonight.

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, {subject} curled on a pile of leaves in deep blue twilight, eyes SNAPPING open at a sudden sound, body tensing, breath catching, torn white shirt collar visible, short startled loop
pieces.caption: What was THAT.

pieces.prompt: 1:1 square, extreme close-up on {subject}'s face in near-darkness, eyes wide open and afraid, knees pulled tight, faint cold moonlight, torn white shirt collar, utterly alone in the vast dark jungle
pieces.caption: Please let me wake up. Please let this be a dream.
